content: what should one aim for in the first pulls?

Normally I think the answer would be a good standard dps like jenkins. Right now, you can kind of just go with whatever looks cool to you. The game gives you a lot of standard pulls, so your starting pull is more about giving you a boost early game. Right now there is currently an event (that will expire in a week) that will give you a free copy of mouchette who is a very strong limited dps that kind of takes away a lot of the pressure at picking up a standard dps to start out.
If you want to build around mouchette, picking up helot from the standard reroll banner might make sense.
Here is a link to he mouchette speed run comp if you are interested https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1455822126568308957

One fun way to do this is by using the Tawil trial

gives you score for the weekly leaderboard, which gives you a good amount of scrips depending on your rank. i recommend doing at least 1 run of the lowest difficulty floor each week. free scrips 🤷‍♂️ 

if you've been doing traphase and have enough score there to qualify for the a higher rank than what you would have otherwise gotten with pdive, do traphase instead. traphase and pdive share the same weekly reward

iirc, the only difference is that traphase has a minimum ranking to qualify for a reward, and their minimum reward is pdive's second minimum. pdive's minimum has no rank requirement, you just gotta get any score to qualify.

What is miryams ritual?? Im not exactly sure how to activate it

Her exalt produces a 0 cost card called sacrament that heals a % of missing HP
When you hold 1/2/3 in hand you get a bonus effect on her cards converting it to the blue version of the card known as obsession that give her aliemus
This is the ritual
